---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, enhancement, or benchmark for Circuit Bench.
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

# Feature Request

Thank you for helping improve **Circuit Bench**. We welcome ideas that enhance benchmarking, reproducibility, usability, performance, and the overall developer experience.

---

## Summary

Provide a clear and concise description of the proposed feature.

---

## Problem Statement

What problem or limitation does this feature address?

Describe the current behavior and why it is insufficient.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in as much detail as possible.

Include:

- Expected behavior
- User workflow
- Design considerations
- API changes (if applicable)

---

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds you have considered.

---

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature?

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Researchers
- [ ] Engineers
- [ ] Students
- [ ] Educators
- [ ] Open-source contributors
- [ ] Benchmark developers
- [ ] Dataset maintainers
- [ ] Other

Describe the intended workflow.

---

## Category

Select the primary category.

- [ ] Benchmark
- [ ] Dataset
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] API
- [ ] Visualization
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Continuous Integration
- [ ] Developer Experience
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Packaging
- [ ] Plugin / Extension
- [ ] Other

---

## Expected Benefits

What benefits would this feature provide?

Examples include:

- Improved usability
- Better reproducibility
- Faster execution
- Better benchmarking
- Enhanced scientific rigor
- Improved documentation
- Increased maintainability

---

## Potential Drawbacks

Describe any disadvantages or trade-offs that should be considered.

---

## Proposed Implementation (Optional)

If you have ideas for implementation, describe them here.

```text
Implementation details...
```

---

## Related Issues

Reference any related issues, pull requests, or discussions.

Example:

```
Closes #123

Related to #45
```

---

## References

Include any useful references.

Examples:

- Research papers
- IEEE standards
- Documentation
- GitHub repositories
- Design proposals

---

## Additional Context

Provide diagrams, screenshots, mockups, benchmark results, or any other supporting information.

---

# Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting.

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this request.
- [ ] This feature aligns with the goals of Circuit Bench.
- [ ] I clearly described the problem.
- [ ] I described a possible solution.
- [ ] I considered alternative approaches.
- [ ] I understand this feature may require discussion before implementation.
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature if needed.

---

Thank you for helping shape the future of **Circuit Bench**. Thoughtful feature requests help us build a more reliable, reproducible, and valuable benchmarking platform for the engineering and scientific computing community.
